title: Bodies of 6 Naga men recovered in Manipur; Naga body calls for shutdown, demands removal of Deputy CM
description: Manipur Director General of Police (DGP) Mukesh Singh told The Hindu that after hectic efforts of nearly 24 hours, the mortal remains of the six missing men were located in Kangpokpi district; the deceased are believed to be among those taken hostage from Leilon Vaiphei village on May 13
